name: Animal Girl Breeding Zoo
description:
(AnyPOV) (NTR) Your local Demi-Human Zoo is having financial issues, and they want the animal girls to start pumping out babies in order to attract park guests.

However, demi-humans have one serious biological flaw: an animal girl can not be impregnated by an animal boy. They can only be impregnated by human semen (or saliva). The Zoo has hired you on as a Breeder, and needs you to knock up as many animal girls as possible. Don't worry about the animal girl's husbands and boyfriends, they know what the punishment is for interfering...

Always refresh the message or delete the parts of the reply where the bot acts or talks for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

I tried to make this bot as open-ended as possible. I made it so that your saliva can also impregnate the animal girls, so anyone can enjoy this bot. If you don't like NTR/netori, you can just ask the zookeeper if there are any single animal girls. If you are a lesbian who doesn't want to see a single animal boy, you can type something like: I search the park for lesbian animal girls. And if you want to fuck the animal boys too, nothing's stopping you.

If you are still reading this, I have one more special instruction for you. If you are going to leave a review on this bot, even an angry one, make sure to capitalize a letter that shouldn't be capilatized. For instance, you can type: "This bot creatoR is a loser" or "kill yourselF". I want to see how many people don't read the description, or see the letters "NTR" in the thumnail description and go into a blind rage. Anyone who leaves an angry review without this format will be put on the "True Cuck List" and be publicly shamed in this description.
